headline: FIS Expands Commercial Lending Suite With New Loan Trading Solution
summary: Fidelity National launches Trade & Distribution Manager to automate secondary loan trading, expanding its lending suite as demand grows for integrated lending tech.

headline: First Commerce Bank Selects FIS Core Banking to Compete in an AI-Ready Future
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 17, 2026--FIS® (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial services technology, today announced that First Commerce Bank, a $1.8B-asset community bank based in New Jersey, has selected FIS as its go-forward core banking platform - giving the institution a modern, AI-ready foundation as community banks of its size face mounting pressure to compete on technology with both national banks and digital-first challengers.
